channel.title: Integrations on Jsonnet-as-a-Service
channel.description: Recent content in Integrations on Jsonnet-as-a-Service

item.title: Integrations & tooling
item.description:
How JaaS fits with the rest of your delivery stack, plus the tooling that drives it from the terminal and from AI assistants.

  • Flux Operator integration — compose JaaS with the Flux Operator’s ResourceSet.
  • Claude Code skill — a skill that helps an assistant author snippets and libraries.
  • MCP server — an MCP server for agent-driven rendering and operator introspection.
